value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI for transforming structured resume data into polished documents (PDF, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, Markdown), featuring pluggable templates and AI-powered prompts for resume review and optimization. Built with Go and TeX for flexible output formats.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Local-first Rust CLI for AI agent memory management, supporting cognitive verbs, markdown memories, semantic search with candle embeddings, and HNSW indexing. Benchmarked on LongMemEval for robust memory operations.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK, CLI, and MCP server for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines, integrating providers like Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google under a single interface. Enables seamless orchestration of advanced AI workflows.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: JavaFX-based Flappy Bird clone showcasing data-oriented design and cross-platform desktop development, with automated native builds for Linux, macOS, and Windows.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with object-oriented design and command-line interface, ideal for learning game logic and exploring chess AI algorithms in Python.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with a terminal UI, written in Rust and Shell for flexible agent orchestration.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Rust-based single binary tool for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, requiring no runtime dependencies.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, offering modular architecture, Q-Learning integration, automated hyperparameter optimization, and support for reinforcement learning and classification tasks.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project focused on optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting the impact of data quantity on deep learning performance.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi, featuring one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux with Neovim, Tmux, Zsh, and AI agent skills.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms, achieving high recall through semantic embeddings and feature extraction.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go utility for durable execution of existing code, enabling ledgers, workers, and queues over user-owned storage with minimal setup.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding plugin for Neovim, allowing users to speak their intent and see edits appear directly in the editor, built with Lua and Rust.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Go apply engine and evaluation CLI for generative workflows.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics tool offering SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation via CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementation of OpenAI Gymnasium environments for reinforcement learning experimentation.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js, showcasing interactive content and technical projects.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, Rust crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers.

value.name: broadcast
value.summary: CLI for converting blog posts into platform-native content for X Articles and LinkedIn, streamlining multi-platform publishing.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, deploying scalable sandboxed agents with NGAC policy enforcement and workspace metrics.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: BCS thesis project on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, written in TeX and Shell.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Observable language models with readable hidden states, featuring a workspace of architectures and a glassbox CLI for tracing, causal probing, and faithfulness coverage.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning, designed for robust model evaluation.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally for secure idea management.

value.name: oag
value.summary: OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, using Jinja2 template packs for customizable output and SSE streaming.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI in Rust, offering automated semantic versioning from conventional commits in a single static binary.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support for communication-focused learning.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README with auto-generated metrics, project spotlights, and portfolio tables, regenerated on a schedule by github-insights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust, supporting robust and modular workflows.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct control of Zigbee devices without cloud or hub, written in Go and Shell.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproducible example for a Cypress issue, using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Android trading app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, facilitating peer-to-peer item exchanges with enterprise-grade mobile development patterns.

preamble.value: I engineer streaming AI agent systems and memory tools from scratch, blending Rust and Go for modularity and speed. Projects like saige and mnemonist show my focus: unified orchestration, local-first cognition, and seamless integration across the stack.
